zh.Radwell, Hertfordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾拉德維爾
zh.Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾圖維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey於大約1137年出生在英國貝德福爾圖維時，她的父親William d'Alneto8歲，母親Joice d'Engaine18歲。她於1189年與Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell在英國英格蘭貝德福爾圖維結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1220年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey于大约1137年出生在英国貝德福爾圖維时，她的父亲William d'Alneto8岁，母亲Joice d'Engaine18岁。她于1189年与Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell在英国英格兰貝德福爾圖維结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1220年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Alento
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian and Hispanic: nickname from Italian and Spanish talento ‘talent’. As a surname of Spanish origin it is also found in the Philippines.
Italian: from the medieval personal name Talento, a short form of Bontalento, an omen or well-wishing name (meaning ‘good destiny’ in Corsican dialect).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey was born about 1137, in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, her father, William d'Alneto, was 8 and her mother, Joice d'Engaine, was 18. She married Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell in 1189, in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1220, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey est née environ 1137, à Turvey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William d'Alneto, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Joice d'Engaine, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell en 1189, à Turvey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1220, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey um 1137 in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d'Alneto 8 und ihre Mutter Joice d'Engaine 18. Sie hat 1189 in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1220 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey è nata il circa 1137 nel Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, William d'Alneto, aveva 8 anni e sua madre, Joice d'Engaine, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell nel 1189, nel Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1220, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Alento , heiress of Turveyが約1137年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトゥルビーで生まれた時，父William d'Alnetoは8歳，母Joice d'Engaineは18歳であった。1189年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトゥルビーでEustace le Mordaunt , of Radwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1220年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey(이)가 대략 1137년 영국 베드퍼드실르 터르비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Alneto(은)는 8세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joice d'Engaine(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 터르비에서 Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey nasceu aproximadamente 1137, em Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William d'Alneto, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Joice d'Engaine, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell em 1189, em Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1220, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Alento , heiress of Turvey родилась около 1137 г. в местности турви, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William d'Alneto было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Joice d'Engaine, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell в 1189 г. в местности турви, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1220 г. в её родном городе.

Se casó con Eustace le Mordaunt , of Radwell en 1189, en Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1220, en su pueblo.
